name: Neon Phantom X1
description: A bold digital timepiece with neon-lit display and shock-resistant casing. Built for those who live fast and think faster.

name: Street King Chrono
description: Chronograph with a raw street aesthetic. Stainless steel case, sapphire glass, water-resistant to 50m.

name: Obsidian Mechanic
description: Hand-wound mechanical movement visible through exhibition caseback. Dark PVD coating with orange accents.

name: Volt Rush Digital
description: Bold digital face with dual-time display, stopwatch, and countdown. Waterproof silicone strap.

name: Chrome Cruiser
description: Smooth brushed chrome dial with minimalist hands. Mesh bracelet with a push-button clasp.

name: Tourbillon Ghost
description: Skeleton tourbillon movement with 72-hour power reserve. A masterpiece of micro-engineering.

name: Acid Flux Sport
description: Sport digital with heart rate monitor, GPS tracking, and 10-day battery. Built for street athletes.

name: Midnight Driver
description: Racing-inspired tachymeter bezel with leather rally strap. Luminescent indices for night driving.

name: Copper Core Auto
description: Automatic self-winding with copper-toned movement. 25 jewel movement with date complication.

name: Glitch Grid
description: Pixel-art inspired digital face with glitch animations. Lightweight polycarbonate case.

name: Tungsten Street
description: Matte black tungsten case with a bold 44mm dial. Ceramic bezel with 60-minute graduations.

name: Pulse Reactor
description: Smart digital with notification alerts, music control, and NFC payments. 5-day battery life.

name: Rose Riot
description: Rose gold case with a vibrant pink dial. Bold indices and a silicone sports strap.

name: Iron Jaw Diver
description: 300m water resistant diver with screw-down crown and unidirectional rotating bezel. ISO 6425 certified.

name: Vector Volt
description: Clean vector-display with altitude, barometer, and compass. Ideal for urban adventurers.

name: Maverick GMT
description: GMT complication for world travelers. Bidirectional bezel with 24-hour markings. Sapphire crystal.

name: Neon Blaze 2
description: Second-gen neon display with improved brightness and customizable color themes. USB-C fast charging.

name: Slate Phantom
description: Slate grey sunray dial with hands in matching DLC coating. Hybrid leather-rubber strap.

name: Skeleton Outlaw
description: Open-worked dial reveals full mechanical movement. Engraved bridges with black rhodium plating.

name: Rapid Strike Sport
description: Shock-absorbing G-type design with 200m water resistance and solar charging panel.

name: Cobalt Fury
description: Vivid cobalt blue display with tactical mode, backlight settings, and rugged polymer body.

name: Gold Rush Chrono
description: Vintage-inspired chronograph in yellow gold PVD. Panda dial with red accents. Genuine croc strap.

name: Kinetic Storm
description: Kinetic movement converts your motion to electricity. Never needs a battery change again.

name: Strobe Sync
description: Synchronized multi-zone time display with a DJ-inspired aesthetic. Interchangeable LED bands.

name: Dark Matter Auto
description: Anti-magnetic automatic with 48-hour power reserve. Black ceramic case with anti-reflective coating.

name: Electric Feel
description: Entry-level street digital with customizable watch faces and alarm with 5 presets.

name: Steel Riot
description: All-stainless steel construction with a bold silver case and textured dial. Solid bracelet.

name: Phantom Flux
description: Regulator-style movement with separate hour and minute displays. Vintage military aesthetic.

name: Urban Nomad
description: Solar-powered digital with world time, sunrise/sunset data, and moon phase display.

name: Circuit Breaker
description: Circuit-board patterned bezel with digital matrix display. EL backlight with 5-color modes.

name: Viper Automatic
description: Swiss-style automatic movement in a sporty 42mm case. Quick-release rubber strap system.

name: Toxic Green Sport
description: Neon-green accented sport watch with 15 fitness modes and real-time pace tracking.

name: Glacier Dial
description: Icy blue sunburst dial with cathedral hands and a white rubber strap. Limited summer edition.

name: Rebel Moon
description: Moonphase complication with enamel celestial disc. Hand-finished bridges with rose gold accents.

name: Bass Drop Digital
description: Music festival inspired colorway with bold numerals and equalizer animation on display.

name: Tidal Force Diver
description: 500m dive watch with helium escape valve and tritium lume tubes. Professional grade reliability.

name: Infrared Pilot
description: Aviation-inspired digital with altimeter, flight computer functions, and atomic time sync.

name: Obsidian Loop
description: All-black aesthetic with OLED display and always-on complications. Wireless charging capable.

name: Rust Proof Racer
description: Motorsport-inspired tachymeter with pulsometer scale. Red and black racing color scheme.

name: Wanderer Tourbillon
description: Flying tourbillon at 6 o'clock with perpetual calendar. Limited to 50 pieces worldwide.

name: Frequency X
description: Multi-band radio-controlled accuracy. Auto-sync at midnight for perpetual precision.

name: Magma Core
description: Lava-inspired orange and black dial with a rugged case and honeycomb pattern bezel.

name: Carbon Ghost Auto
description: Carbon fibre dial with automatic movement and 60-hour power reserve. Forged carbon case.

name: UV Riot
description: Ultra-violet reactive case material glows under black light. Perfect for rave culture.

name: Platinum Dream
description: Platinum finished case with a white lacquer dial. Handcrafted alligator leather strap.

name: Grunge Gear
description: Industrial-aesthetic with exposed screws, crown guards, and a NATO strap in charcoal grey.

name: Skyline Sensor
description: Urban sensor package: air quality index, UV radiation, and temperature in real time.

name: Bolt Analog
description: Lightning bolt motif on a matte black dial. Bold yellow accents on hands and markers.

name: Deep Freeze Auto
description: Ice-blue automatic with brushed titanium case. Anti-shock movement with high-beat 36000vph.

name: Pulse Rider
description: Day-date complication with a sporty brown dial and premium calfskin leather strap.

name: Storm Chaser
description: Weather forecasting digital with barometric trend graph and storm warning alerts.

name: Acid Jazz
description: Retro-futuristic digital with jazz-era font and analogue hands combined with digital display.

name: Burnout Classic
description: Classic 3-hand design with a fire-red dial and a deployant clasp on the leather strap.

name: Forge Master
description: Automatic with custom-engraved movement plates visible through sapphire caseback.

name: Wave Rider Solar
description: Solar charging panel integrated into wave-textured bezel. 10-month power reserve.

name: Hyper Ink
description: E-ink display technology in a watch form factor. 30-day battery, always-on capability.

name: Moonwatcher
description: Astronomical moonphase display accurate to 122 years. Deep blue enamel dial.

name: Nuke Runner
description: Military field watch aesthetic with tritium lume and anti-magnetic soft iron cage.

name: Quantum Leap Digital
description: Quantum dot display technology with infinite contrast and ultra-low power consumption.

name: Brutalist Block
description: Square 40mm brutalist case with no-nonsense dial. An architectural statement on your wrist.

name: Phantom Racer
description: Rally-inspired dial with race flag motif on the seconds hand. Perforated racing strap.

name: Echo Automatic
description: In-house automatic with micro-rotor winding and 55-hour power reserve. Meteorite dial.

name: Smash Digital
description: Sporty budget digital with 10 alarms, countdown, and lap timer for daily training.

name: Crown Prince
description: Manual wind dress watch with gold-filled case and white lacquered dial. Formal elegance meets street edge.

name: Titan Flux
description: Grade 5 titanium case at only 75 grams. Ultra-light comfort for all-day wear.

name: Frequency 2
description: Upgraded frequency sensor with improved GPS accuracy and instant pace feedback for runners.

name: Styx Skeleton
description: Full skeleton dial revealing every gear train. Blued hands contrast against bronze plates.

name: Overture Digital
description: Dual-display hybrid combining digital readout with miniature analog sub-dial.

name: Nitro Pilot
description: Oversized 46mm pilot watch with slide rule bezel and bi-directional rotating timing ring.

name: Solar Arc
description: Solar arc tracker shows hours of daylight for your location. Perfect for outdoor enthusiasts.

name: Dynamo Chrono
description: Kinetic chronograph energy converted from wrist movement. Zero battery required ever.

name: Phantom Eclipse
description: Day-night indicator with eclipse complication. Meteorite stone inlay on black ceramic bezel.

name: Flash Point
description: Fastest 0.1 second stopwatch display on a consumer digital watch. Racer's precision.

name: Chrome Dagger
description: Dagger-shaped hands over a sunray-brushed silver dial. An uncompromising aesthetic statement.

name: Night Vision X
description: Ultra-bright NV-grade backlight with night mode reducing blue light to protect your vision.

name: Solstice Moonphase
description: Triple calendar with moonphase complication. Unique sky chart dial with star map rendering.

name: Hyper Drift
description: Grip-tape textured strap with a bold contrast display for maximum readability.

name: Rebel Classic
description: Three-link bracelet with an opalin grey dial. Vintage datejust inspiration meets street credibility.

name: Atomic Blaze
description: Atomic radio-controlled with automatic DST adjustment for 40 time zones worldwide.

name: Vortex Automatic
description: Vortex-patterned movement rotor visible through exhibition caseback. 70-hour power reserve.

name: Punk Circuit
description: Circuit board pattern on bezel with punk-inspired typography on display. Customisable alarms.

name: Jade Horizon
description: Jade green sunray dial with gold hands. Perfectly balanced between street and luxury.

name: Blaze Tracker
description: Personal safety features: SOS beacon, fall detection, and emergency contact alerts.

name: Noir Perpetual
description: Perpetual calendar requiring no adjustment until 2100. Pitch-black PVD with silver lettering.

name: Cyber Flux 3
description: Third-generation Cyber Flux with improved AMOLED display and 7-day battery life.

name: Street Prophet
description: Prophet-inspired numerals in gold on a black brushed dial. Deployant folding clasp.

name: Nebula Chrono
description: Nebula-painted enamel dial on automatic chronograph. Each piece unique due to hand-applied enamel.

name: Surge Solar
description: High-efficiency solar digital, fully charged in 3 hours of sunlight. 6-month reserve.

name: Zero Dark
description: Blacked-out everything: case, dial, hands, indices, strap. Total stealth mode activated.

name: Flare Gun Auto
description: Military-inspired automatic with compass bezel and olive drab strap. Built for tough missions.

name: Bass Wave
description: Sound-reactive bass meter on the display. Connects to music via BLE for live beat sync.

name: Chrome King II
description: Successor to Chrome King with polished bezel, new movement and improved water resistance 100m.

name: Data Punk
description: Data visualization inspired face showing calendar heat-maps and weekly stats on sub-displays.

name: Aurora Moonphase
description: Aurora borealis enamel dial with hand-painted moonphase disc. Each piece a wearable artwork.

name: Sprint Mode
description: Dedicated sprint timer mode with visual countdown and vibration cues for interval training.

name: Graphite Fox
description: Graphite-treated case with a fox-red seconds hand. Anti-glare sapphire with edge-to-edge view.

name: Galactic Drift
description: Space-themed digital with cosmic screensaver and star-map overlay when idle.

name: Iron Curtain Auto
description: Cold-war inspired automatic with Soviet-era aesthetics. Exhibition caseback reveals vintage-style movement.

name: Ember Field
description: Field watch warmth: warm amber indices on olive-green canvas dial. Swiss quartz movement.

name: Hyperion Auto
description: Flagship automatic: 72-hour reserve, 50m WR, sapphire crystal, and finishing by hand. The pinnacle.

name: Street Phantom Ultra
description: Ultra-bright OLED with a matte-finish polymer case and interchangeable straps. Street icon status.

name: Void Walker
description: Deep space inspired dial with void black lacquer and luminescent constellation markers.

name: Wildfire Chrono
description: Mechanical chronograph with fire-orange sunburst dial and 45-hour power reserve.

name: Reflex Nano
description: The smallest FluxWear digital yet. Full features in a 38mm case for those who go minimalist.

name: Cyber Sovereign
description: Premium analog CyberWatch with in-house quartz movement and sapphire domed crystal. Flagship.
